scripts.dev:extension: npm run native:install -w main && npm run dev:extension -w main
scripts.build:extension: npm run build:extension -w main && npm run native:install -w main
scripts.dev:tauri: concurrently -k "npm run dev:desktop-renderer -w main" "wait-on tcp:4173 && cd tauri-app && cargo tauri dev"
scripts.build:tauri: npm run build:desktop-renderer -w main && cd tauri-app && cargo tauri build
scripts.dev:windows: concurrently -k "npm run dev:desktop-renderer -w main" "wait-on tcp:4173 && cross-env KWC_DESKTOP_RENDERER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4173 electron windows-app/electron/main.cjs"
scripts.stage:windows: npm run build:desktop-renderer -w main && node windows-app/scripts/prepare-build.mjs
scripts.build:windows: npm run stage:windows && electron-builder --projectDir windows-app --win portable --x64
scripts.dev:mac: concurrently -k "npm run dev:desktop-renderer -w main" "wait-on tcp:4173 && cross-env KWC_DESKTOP_RENDERER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4173 electron mac-app/electron/main.cjs"
scripts.stage:mac: npm run build:desktop-renderer -w main && node mac-app/scripts/prepare-build.mjs
scripts.build:mac: npm run stage:mac && electron-builder --projectDir mac-app --mac dir
